flick.role: Press states, tick draws, focus. Confirms.

snap.role: Toggles, tab indicators, menus — one crisp overshoot. Switches.

drift.role: Large surfaces, ambient drift, parallax settle. Breathes.

recoil.role: Toasts, stamps, landings — two visible bounces. Celebrates.

motion.cascadeRule: Stagger interval = clamp(0.6 / (count - 1), 0.02, 0.06)s so the whole choreography stays under a 600ms budget; dense lists tighten automatically.
motion.exitRule: Exits are always tweens at 0.6x the enter duration with the exit easing — springs on exit read as indecision.
motion.reducedMotion: prefers-reduced-motion is a first-class state. Transform enters become opacity fades; discrete springs snap to position with a color tween; direct manipulation keeps 1:1 tracking but drops inertia; autoplay loops go static; scroll-linked renders its final frame; number rolls swap instantly. Every component reads useMotionSafe(), never matchMedia directly.

items.title: Pressure Button
items.tagline: A button that pushes back.
items.description: A button that pushes back — press squash on flick, spring rebound on snap, and a hold-to-confirm gauge ring for destructive actions.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style. Danger pairs naturally with holdToConfirm.

props.name: size
props.description: Control height and typography scale.

props.name: holdToConfirm
props.description: Milliseconds the button must be held before confirming. Adds a gauge ring; Escape or early release cancels.

props.name: onConfirm
props.description: Fires when a hold completes. Hold buttons never fire onClick.

usageNotes: Space and Enter drive the same physics as the pointer — hold either to confirm.
Under reduced motion the squash is replaced by a shade change; the gauge ring still fills because progress is feedback, not flourish.

items.title: Trace Input
items.tagline: Focus draws its own boundary.
items.description: Focus draws its own boundary — a stroke traces the field's perimeter, the label glides to an overline, and errors annotate themselves with a dimension line.

props.name: label
props.description: Field label — rests as placeholder, floats to overline when focused or filled.

props.name: description / error
props.description: Helper and error lines below the field, chained into aria-describedby. Errors nudge the field and set aria-invalid.

props.name: prefix / suffix
props.description: Leading and trailing slots inside the field.

props.name: …input props
props.description: Standard input passthrough; controlled and uncontrolled both work.

usageNotes: The perimeter trace doubles as the focus indicator — it is never removed, only accelerated.
Under reduced motion the stroke appears instantly and the error nudge is skipped; the message still announces via aria-invalid.

items.title: Breaker Switch
items.tagline: A toggle with mechanical conviction.
items.description: A toggle with mechanical conviction — the thumb stretches in anticipation while held, throws on snap, and squashes against the track end as the rail recoils.

props.name: checked / defaultChecked / onCheckedChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled state.

props.name: size
props.description: Fixed geometry — travel is derived, nothing is measured.

props.name: onLabel / offLabel
props.description: Tiny uppercase text inside the track ends.

props.name: label
props.description: Adjacent clickable label, associated automatically.

props.name: name / value
props.description: Renders a hidden input that submits while checked.

usageNotes: A native button with role="switch" — Space and Enter throw it, and Space arms the anticipation stretch.
Under reduced motion the thumb repositions instantly; only the color crossfade remains.

items.title: Checkbox
items.tagline: The tick is drawn, not shown.
items.description: The tick is drawn, not shown — a pathLength stroke on flick, an indeterminate dash that slides in, and group select-alls that cascade down the list.

props.name: checked / defaultChecked
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled checked state.

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Mixed state — dash visual plus native el.indeterminate.

props.name: onCheckedChange
props.description: Fires with the next checked state.

props.name: label / description
props.description: Visible label (required) and muted secondary line.

props.name: CheckboxGroup
props.description: Fieldset-based group with select-all parent (checked / unchecked / indeterminate) and cascading tick draws.

usageNotes: Native hidden inputs do the accessibility work; the drawn box is decorative.
Under reduced motion ticks appear instantly and select-all cascades lose their stagger.

items.title: Caliper Slider
items.tagline: Reads like a vernier, moves like grease.
items.description: Reads like a vernier, moves like grease — 1:1 drag with a snap settle, ticks that lean toward the jaw, and a live measured-span dimension line in range mode.

props.name: min / max / step
props.description: Bounds and snap grid (float-precision cleaned).

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Single or range; live stepped values during drag, deduped.

props.name: range
props.description: Two facing caliper jaws with a live span dimension line.

props.name: marks
props.description: Every step when ≤ 40 steps, else quarters; or pinned positions.

props.name: format / readout
props.description: Value formatting and where the mono readout renders.

usageNotes: Full APG slider keyboard set per thumb; range thumbs cross-clamp their ARIA bounds.
Under reduced motion tracking stays 1:1 — only the tick lean and the settle spring are removed.

items.title: Gantry Tabs
items.tagline: The indicator rides a rail.
items.description: The indicator rides a rail — its leading edge glides ahead while the trailing edge lags a beat, stretching toward the destination before contracting to fit.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled active tab.

props.name: variant
props.description: Indicator style.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout and arrow-key axis.

props.name: activationMode
props.description: Activate on focus, or on Enter/Space.

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: Keep inactive panels mounted but hidden.

usageNotes: Full APG tabs keyboard support with wrapping arrows; disabled triggers are skipped.
Under reduced motion the indicator teleports and panels crossfade without the lift.

items.title: Drawer Accordion
items.tagline: Opens like a specimen cabinet.
items.description: Opens like a specimen cabinet — height glides while the inner content lags a beat behind, like paper settling in a pulled drawer.

props.name: type
props.description: Open one drawer at a time, or many.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled open value(s).

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires with the next open value(s).

props.name: collapsible
props.description: Single mode: allow closing the open item.

props.name: Item.value / Item.disabled
props.description: Unique drawer id; disabled items are skipped in arrow navigation.

props.name: Trigger.icon
props.description: Leading icon slot before the header label.

usageNotes: Full APG accordion keyboard support: Arrow keys move between headers, Home and End jump.
Under reduced motion drawers open instantly and content crossfades — no lag, no sibling nudge.

items.title: Callout
items.tagline: A label with a leader line.
items.description: A tooltip with a leader line — the label pops from the anchor while a schematic elbow line draws itself to the card.

props.name: content
props.description: Label content. Never put interactive elements here.

props.name: side / align
props.description: Anchor side and cross-axis alignment.

props.name: delay
props.description: Hover open delay in ms. Keyboard focus opens instantly.

props.name: followCursor
props.description: Label trails the pointer with drift-damped lag; leader line omitted.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Never opens.

usageNotes: Opens on hover and on keyboard focus; Escape dismisses.
Under reduced motion the card fades in place — no pop, no leader draw, and followCursor pins to the anchor.

items.title: Morph Dialog
items.tagline: The trigger becomes the dialog.
items.description: The trigger becomes the dialog — a shared-element morph glides the card you clicked into the panel it opens, and reverses on close.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled open state.

props.name: size
props.description: Panel width preset; ignored by the sheet variant.

props.name: sheet
props.description: Bottom-sheet variant — full-width, pinned to the bottom edge.

props.name: dismissible
props.description: Escape, backdrop click, and the built-in close button.

props.name: portal
props.description: Portal to body, or contain the overlay in a relative parent.

props.name: Content.title / Content.description
props.description: Wired to aria-labelledby and aria-describedby; title renders as h2.

usageNotes: Focus is trapped while open and restored to the trigger on close; body scroll locks in portal mode.
Under reduced motion the morph becomes a plain centered fade.

items.title: Select
items.tagline: A menu that unfolds from where you asked.
items.description: A menu that unfolds from where you asked — the panel scales from the trigger's edge, options cascade in, and a highlight bar glides between them.

props.name: items
props.description: Flat options, labeled groups, or a mix; options take value, label, description, disabled.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled selection.

props.name: searchable
props.description: Pins a filter input at the top of the panel.

props.name: placeholder / label / name
props.description: Empty-state text, wired visible label, and hidden form input.

usageNotes: Combobox APG throughout: aria-activedescendant highlight, wrapping arrows, typeahead, Escape restores focus.
Under reduced motion everything fades — no scale, no cascade, instant highlight bar.

items.title: Telemetry Toast
items.tagline: Messages that queue like readings.
items.description: Messages that queue like readings — recoil arrivals, a depth-receding stack, swipe dismissal with velocity projection, and timers that pause under your pointer.

props.name: ToastProvider.position
props.description: Viewport corner for the stack.

props.name: ToastProvider.max
props.description: Visible stack size; extras queue FIFO.

props.name: useToast()
props.description: Imperative API from anywhere under the provider.

props.name: ToastInput
props.description: Variants info | success | warn | danger; duration ≤ 0 persists; action renders a button.

usageNotes: Danger toasts announce as alerts; the region is focusable via an Alt+T hotkey chord and timers pause on hover or focus.
Under reduced motion the stack flattens to a list with fade-only transitions — the progress hairline still drains.

items.title: Readout
items.tagline: Numbers with momentum.
items.description: Numbers with momentum — per-digit vertical rolls with real carry propagation, so 199 → 200 visibly carries right to left.

props.name: value
props.description: The numeric value to display.

props.name: format
props.description: Formats the value; non-digit characters render as static cells.

props.name: size
props.description: Type scale.

props.name: rollOn
props.description: With "increase", decreases swap instantly — right for latency-style metrics.

props.name: delta
props.description: Change badge that flips up when the value moves.

usageNotes: Rolling digits are aria-hidden; a polite live region announces the settled value once per burst.
Under reduced motion the value swaps instantly with a brief highlight pulse.

items.title: Focus Text
items.tagline: Copy that resolves under the lens.
items.description: Copy that resolves under the lens — words sharpen from an 8px blur like a microscope focus-pull, cascaded under the 600ms budget.

props.name: children
props.description: The copy to resolve.

props.name: as
props.description: Rendered element.

props.name: by
props.description: Split granularity; char mode never breaks mid-word.

props.name: trigger / once
props.description: When the pull runs, and whether it re-blurs out of view.

props.name: stagger / startDelay
props.description: Seconds between units (defaults to the cascade budget) and lead-in delay.

usageNotes: Screen readers get a clean sr-only copy; the animated units are aria-hidden.
Under reduced motion the block does a single fast fade — text is always readable.

items.title: Flapboard
items.tagline: Split-flap departures for your data.
items.description: Split-flap departures for your data — each cell flips through intermediate characters with a column cascade, like an airport board settling.

props.name: value
props.description: Text to display, normalized against the charset.

props.name: chars
props.description: Charset scanned in flip order.

props.name: flipSpeed
props.description: Milliseconds per flip step.

props.name: padTo / align
props.description: Minimum cell count and which side the value sits on.

props.name: size
props.description: Fixed tile dimensions.

usageNotes: Cells are aria-hidden; a polite status region announces the settled value once.
Under reduced motion the board crossfades to the new value — no flipping.

items.title: Scope Scrubber
items.tagline: Drag a value; watch its physics.
items.description: Drag a value; watch its physics — a scrub input with a live oscilloscope trace behind the numeral, where the settle spring's overshoot draws itself.

props.name: min / max / step
props.description: Bounds (required) and release snap grid.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled; fires live while scrubbing.

props.name: settle
props.description: Which calibrated spring the value settles on — its personality shows on the trace.

props.name: sensitivity
props.description: Value change per pixel of drag.

props.name: label / unit / format / trace
props.description: Labeling, suffix, numeral formatting, and the history trace toggle.

usageNotes: Enter or double-click converts the plate into a plain number input; Escape cancels.
Under reduced motion scrubbing stays 1:1, release snaps instantly, and the trace hides.

items.title: Metronome Loader
items.tagline: Waiting, kept honest.
items.description: Waiting, kept honest — a pendulum, a bearing cradle, or a radar sweep; give it a value and it morphs into a determinate arc gauge.

props.name: variant
props.description: Indeterminate style; ignored once value is set.

props.name: value
props.description: 0–100; presence morphs the loader into a determinate arc gauge.

props.name: label / showLabel
props.description: Accessible name; optionally rendered visibly.

usageNotes: role="progressbar" throughout — indeterminate announces Loading, determinate reports its value.
Under reduced motion the loops freeze to a static glyph with a slow opacity pulse.

items.title: Gyro Card
items.tagline: A card with a sense of balance.
items.description: A card with a sense of balance — pointer tilt with real inertia that overshoots past level and rebalances when you leave, with layered parallax and tracking glare.

props.name: maxTilt
props.description: Peak rotation toward the pointer, in degrees.

props.name: glare
props.description: Radial sheen that tracks the light angle.

props.name: GyroLayer.depth
props.description: Parallax depth for child slots — pinned, ±4px, or ±8px counter-translation.

usageNotes: The motion is decorative: DOM order is untouched, and keyboard focus inside flattens the card to an energized ring state.
Under reduced motion there is no tilt, parallax, or glare — hover becomes a border emphasis.

items.title: Magnet Dock
items.tagline: Icons that feel the cursor coming.
items.description: Icons that feel the cursor coming — a cosine distance field magnifies the dock, and drag-reorder parts neighbors magnetically before snapping into a slot.

props.name: items
props.description: { id, label, icon, active?, onSelect? } per icon.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Dock axis — pointer tracking, tooltips, and arrows follow.

props.name: magnify
props.description: Peak scale under the pointer or keyboard focus.

props.name: reorderable / onReorder
props.description: Pointer drag plus Space-lift keyboard reordering, announced live.

usageNotes: role="toolbar" with roving tabindex; a focused icon magnifies without the pointer.
Under reduced motion magnification is replaced by a 2px raise; reordering still works, 1:1.

items.title: Conveyor List
items.tagline: A queue that moves like a belt.
items.description: A queue that moves like a belt — items drift in from the feed side, brake into their slot with a squash, and lift off the belt when removed.

props.name: items / keyFor / renderItem
props.description: Generic queue contents with stable keys driving enter, exit, and reorder identity.

props.name: side
props.description: The feed edge new items enter from.

props.name: maxVisible
props.description: Rows shown before the oldest overflow into a +N more count.

props.name: announceItem
props.description: Screen-reader text per row for the live log region.

usageNotes: The list is a role="log" live region — arrivals are announced politely.
Under reduced motion rows crossfade in place and layout shifts are instant.

items.title: Ticker Tape
items.tagline: A marquee with friction.
items.description: A marquee with friction — hover applies drag, grabbing tracks 1:1, and a fling carries real momentum that decays back to duty speed.

props.name: speed
props.description: Duty cruising speed in px/s.

props.name: direction
props.description: Travel direction.

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap between items and loop copies.

props.name: pauseOnHover
props.description: Ease to 30% duty speed while hovered.

usageNotes: A visible pause control surfaces on keyboard focus; duplicated sequences are aria-hidden.
Under reduced motion the tape renders as a static wrapped grid showing each item once.

items.title: Scan Reveal
items.tagline: Sections develop as the scanner passes.
items.description: Sections develop as the scanner passes — a scroll-linked scan line sweeps once, and content resolves beneath it with a coordinate readout riding the beam.

props.name: once
props.description: Tear down the dual layers after the sweep completes.

props.name: direction
props.description: Sweep direction.

props.name: containerRef
props.description: Scrollable ancestor for scroll-linking inside overflow containers.

usageNotes: Interactive content lives only in the developed layer; the undeveloped copy is aria-hidden and inert.
Under reduced motion content renders fully developed with a single fast fade.

items.title: Radio Group
items.tagline: Selection that travels, never teleports.
items.description: Selection that travels, never teleports — one shared dot glides between rings while the receiving ring arms with a squash and rebounds as it lands.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled selection.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout and aria-orientation.

props.name: name / label
props.description: Hidden native radios for form posts; visible group label (or pass aria-label).

props.name: Item.value / Item.description
props.description: Item identity and a muted secondary line.

usageNotes: Full APG radio keyboard: arrows wrap and select, Space selects, Home and End jump.
Under reduced motion the dot swaps instantly with only a border-color tween.

items.title: Code Cells
items.tagline: Six digits, dropped into place.
items.description: Six digits, dropped into place — one hidden one-time-code input drives visual cells with digit drops, underline ticks, and a rejection nudge.

props.name: length
props.description: Cell count; also the hidden input's maxLength.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled code, digits only.

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Fires once per fill; re-arms when the code shrinks.

props.name: error / errorMessage
props.description: Destructive borders plus a row nudge and a role=alert line.

props.name: groups
props.description: e.g. [3,3] renders a separator between digit groups.

props.name: ref
props.description: Reaches the hidden input — focus() after clearing.

usageNotes: The single hidden input with autocomplete="one-time-code" is the accessibility-correct OTP pattern — cells are decorative.
Under reduced motion digits appear instantly and the nudge is skipped; the alert still announces.

items.title: Action Relay
items.tagline: A button that narrates the job.
items.description: A button that narrates the job — state labels roll through a one-line mask with a blur crossfade while the width follows the new content.

props.name: state / states
props.description: Controlled state key and the content per state — nodes may embed icons or a small loader.

props.name: busyStates
props.description: States that report aria-busy and suppress interaction without stealing focus.

props.name: onSettled
props.description: Fires when the incoming roll lands — chain done → idle off it.

props.name: announcements
props.description: Screen-reader text per state; plain-text nodes announce themselves.

props.name: variant / size
props.description: Visual style, mirroring the button family.

usageNotes: Busy states keep focus (aria-disabled, not disabled) so the announcement chain is never interrupted.
Under reduced motion labels crossfade and the width jumps; onSettled still fires.

items.title: Status Seal
items.tagline: Status, re-stamped on every change.
items.description: Status, re-stamped on every change — variant swaps stamp in on recoil, a live pulse ring breathes at drift tempo, and counts carry-roll.

props.name: variant
props.description: Semantic tinting with token fallbacks for consumer apps.

props.name: children / icon
props.description: Label and optional leading node (defaults to a status dot).

props.name: count
props.description: Embeds a small Readout so numbers carry-roll without re-stamping.

props.name: live
props.description: Pulse ring behind the dot at drift tempo.

usageNotes: role="status" announces label and count once per change, debounced.
Under reduced motion swaps are instant and the pulse ring holds static at mid-opacity.

items.title: Slipstream
items.tagline: A highlight that rides in your wake.
items.description: A highlight that rides in your wake — one pill glides behind hovered or focused items with a trailing-edge stretch, in any direction.

props.name: radius / inset
props.description: Pill corner radius, and how far it tucks inside each item rect (negative bleeds out).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Parks the pill and ignores hover/focus.

props.name: SlipstreamItem
props.description: Wrap each link or button; the wrapper registers its rect for the pill to target.

usageNotes: Keyboard focus drives the pill exactly like hover — focusin on the group targets the focused item.
Under reduced motion the pill teleports with a fast fade; no trailing stretch.

items.title: Drawer
items.tagline: A side panel on rails.
items.description: A side panel on rails — slides in on glide, drags toward its edge 1:1, and a projected release past 40% lets it leave with the momentum it already has.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled visibility.

props.name: side / size
props.description: Edge and width preset (288 / 360 / 440).

props.name: dismissible / portal
props.description: Escape, backdrop, and edge-drag dismissal; portal locks body scroll.

props.name: Trigger / Content / Title / Description / Close
props.description: Composable parts sharing one context.

usageNotes: The backdrop's opacity is bound to the drag — dismissal fades exactly as far as you've pulled.
Under reduced motion the panel fades; dragging stays 1:1 with instant resolution.

items.title: Bottom Sheet
items.tagline: It snaps where your gesture was going.
items.description: It snaps where your gesture was going — velocity-projected releases settle on the nearest snap point in the gesture's direction, with rubber-band overdrag.

props.name: snapPoints / initialSnap / onSnapChange
props.description: Resting heights as viewport fractions; every settle reports its index.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled visibility.

props.name: dismissible / portal
props.description: Projecting past the lowest snap dismisses; portal measures the visual viewport.

props.name: Handle
props.description: The grab pill is a real button — arrows step snaps, Home/End jump, each step announces.

usageNotes: The backdrop opacity is bound to the sheet's travel, live during the drag.
Under reduced motion it fades to its snap and releases resolve instantly; dragging stays 1:1.

items.title: Cipher Text
items.tagline: Characters lock in from the noise.
items.description: Characters lock in from the noise — glyphs cycle deterministically, then resolve left-to-right under the 600ms cascade budget with a signal pulse per lock.

props.name: children
props.description: Copy to resolve; split into per-character mono cells.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Hover re-scrambles then resolves on every entry.

props.name: order
props.description: Lock-in sequence; random is hash-shuffled, never Math.random.

props.name: charset / speed / as
props.description: Glyph pool, ms per scramble tick, rendered element.

usageNotes: Screen readers and no-JS visitors get the clean string; the scramble layer is aria-hidden.
Under reduced motion the text renders plainly with a single fast fade.

items.title: Ledger
items.tagline: Ten thousand rows, sixty frames.
items.description: Ten thousand rows, sixty frames — a hand-rolled virtualized table where sorting FLIPs only the rows you can see and selection cascades down the window.

props.name: columns / rows / rowId
props.description: Column defs (width px | "1fr", align, sortable, cell, sortFn), the full data set, and stable row identity.

props.name: rowHeight / height / overscan
props.description: Fixed row height, viewport height, and window padding.

props.name: sort / defaultSort / onSortChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled; headers cycle asc → desc → none.

props.name: selectable / selected / onSelectedChange
props.description: Checkbox column; select-all targets every row, not just visible.

props.name: onVisibleRangeChange
props.description: 1-based visible range, emitted from the rAF scroll flush.

usageNotes: Roughly twenty nodes render regardless of row count; sort animates at most thirty visible rows.
Under reduced motion the chevron swaps instantly and rows jump — no FLIP, no tick cascade.

items.title: Zoetrope
items.tagline: Spin the drum; every frame finds its detent.
items.description: Spin the drum; every frame finds its detent — panels ride the inside of a cylinder with drag inertia, wheel steps, and angular-distance dimming.

props.name: children
props.description: Each direct child becomes a drum face (capped at twelve).

props.name: index / defaultIndex / onIndexChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled front panel; fires on every settled detent.

props.name: itemWidth / itemHeight / perspective
props.description: Panel geometry; the ring radius derives from width and count.

props.name: sensitivity
props.description: Drag ratio in degrees per pixel.

props.name: getLabel
props.description: Names panels for the live announcer.

usageNotes: Only the fronted panel is interactive; the rest are inert and aria-hidden.
Under reduced motion the drum becomes a flat scroll-snap row with identical semantics.

items.title: Wavefield
items.tagline: Ambient physics, drawn on canvas.
items.description: Ambient physics, drawn on canvas — interference lattices, drifting contours, breathing grids, and particle fields that pause when unseen.

props.name: variant
props.description: Which field is drawn.

props.name: speed / density / opacity
props.description: Clock rate, geometry density (capped), and canvas-layer opacity.

props.name: children
props.description: Overlay slot above the canvas — it carries all the semantics.

usageNotes: Colors resolve from your theme tokens and re-resolve on theme flips; the loop pauses when hidden or offscreen.
Under reduced motion exactly one designed frame is drawn — the loop never starts.

items.title: Phase Switch
items.tagline: Day to night in one clean sweep.
items.description: Day to night in one clean sweep — a framework-agnostic theme toggle that reveals the new theme as a circle growing from the button, via the View Transitions API.

props.name: checked / onCheckedChange
props.description: Controlled only — flip your own theme class inside the callback; the component owns zero theme logic.

props.name: size / label
props.description: Control size and accessible name.

usageNotes: Add `::view-transition-old(root), ::view-transition-new(root) { animation: none }` to your CSS so the clip reveal isn't fought by the default crossfade.
Unsupported browsers and reduced motion get an instant flip with an icon crossfade.

items.title: Kinetic Gallery
items.tagline: Throw the strip; the nearest frame finds the rail.
items.description: Grab the strip and throw it — release carries momentum that decays and snaps the nearest frame to the rail, with prev/next and dot controls.

props.name: children
props.description: Each direct child is a slide; widths are measured for snapping.

props.name: gap
props.description: Pixel gap between slides.

props.name: align
props.description: Where the active slide settles against the rail.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the gallery region for assistive tech.

usageNotes: Arrow keys step slides, Home and End jump to the ends; a live region announces the current frame.
Under reduced motion it becomes a native scroll-snap strip — direct swipe, no thrown momentum.

items.title: Tile Grid
items.tagline: Drag a tile; the grid reflows around it.
items.description: Drag a tile and the grid reflows around it — the others FLIP-glide into their new slots, with a full keyboard lift-move-drop for reordering without a mouse.

props.name: tiles
props.description: The tiles in their initial order; identity drives the FLIP.

props.name: columns
props.description: Grid column count.

props.name: onOrderChange
props.description: Fires with the new id order after a drop or keyboard move.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the reorderable list.

usageNotes: Keyboard: Space lifts a tile, arrows move it (left/right by one, up/down by a row), Space drops, Escape cancels.
Under reduced motion tiles snap to their new positions — dragging still tracks 1:1, without the glide.

items.title: Segmented Control
items.tagline: A thumb that glides to the chosen segment.
items.description: A compact value picker whose raised thumb glides between segments on snap — radio-group semantics, so it selects a value rather than switching panels.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled selection.

props.name: name / label
props.description: Hidden native radios for form posts; a visible group label (or pass aria-label).

props.name: size
props.description: Control height and type scale.

props.name: Item.value / Item.disabled
props.description: Segment identity and per-segment disabling.

usageNotes: Full APG radio keyboard: arrows move and select (wrapping), Home and End jump, Space selects.
Under reduced motion the thumb appears under the active segment instantly — no travel, color only.

items.title: Triage Deck
items.tagline: Flick to accept, flick to reject.
items.description: A decision stack you flick through — throw a card right to accept or left to reject, a velocity-projected release commits, and the next card rises from behind.

props.name: cards
props.description: The queue; the top card is interactive, the rest peek behind.

props.name: onDecide
props.description: Fires when a card commits in either direction.

props.name: onEmpty
props.description: Fires when the last card is decided.

props.name: acceptLabel / rejectLabel
props.description: Button and affordance labels.

usageNotes: Arrow keys decide (left rejects, right accepts) and buttons drive it pointer-free; a live region announces each decision.
Under reduced motion cards cross-fade instead of flying off — dragging still tracks, without the throw.

items.title: Spark Chart
items.tagline: A trace that draws itself, then reads out.
items.description: A compact line or area chart that draws itself on arrival, then lets you scrub a crosshair that snaps to the nearest point and reads its value.

props.name: data
props.type: number[] | { x: number | string; y: number }[]
props.description: Bare numbers get index labels; objects carry their own x.

props.name: variant
props.description: Stroke only, or a filled area under the curve.

props.name: height / format
props.description: Chart height in px and value formatting for the readout.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name and summary for the trace.

usageNotes: Focus and arrow-key to move the crosshair; Home and End jump; the active point is announced.
Under reduced motion the trace renders fully drawn — scrubbing still works, without the draw-on.

items.title: Radial Bars
items.tagline: Bars that radiate from a hub.
items.description: A polar bar chart — wedges radiate from a hub, each growing to its value on the glide spring; hover or focus a wedge to brighten it and read its value in the hub.

props.name: data
props.type: { label: string; value: number; color?: string }[]
props.description: One wedge per entry; value drives its radial length.

props.name: max
props.description: Value that reaches the outer radius; defaults to the data max.

props.name: size / format
props.description: Diameter in px and value formatting for the readout.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the chart region.

usageNotes: Every wedge is a focusable data point announcing its label and value, so the chart is operable by keyboard.
Under reduced motion the wedges render at full length instantly — the hover/focus highlight is color only.

items.title: Coverflow
items.tagline: Covers that bank away in perspective.
items.description: A cover gallery in perspective — the active card faces you while its neighbors bank away and recede, and any card you steer to glides to the front.

props.name: children
props.description: Each direct child is a cover.

props.name: index / defaultIndex / onIndexChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled active cover.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the gallery region.

usageNotes: Drag, wheel, click a side cover, or arrow-key to steer; a live region announces the active item.
Under reduced motion it flattens to a native scroll-snap row — no perspective, same controls.

items.title: Parallax Scene
items.tagline: Layers that part around the pointer.
items.description: A depth-layered diorama that parades its layers past the pointer — each sits at its own depth, the whole scene tilts toward your cursor and drifts back on leave.

props.name: children
props.description: ParallaxLayer elements, back to front (max ~4).

props.name: maxTilt
props.description: Degrees the scene rotates toward the pointer.

props.name: Layer.depth
props.description: 0 is far and moves least; 1 is near and moves most.

usageNotes: The parallax is decorative — layer content stays in normal flow and fully focusable.
Under reduced motion the layers render flat and stationary at their neutral position.

items.title: Tether Rope
items.tagline: Grab the cord; Verlet does the rest.
items.description: A hanging rope you grab and swing — a Verlet chain with gravity and length constraints, so it whips, goes taut, and settles like real cord.

props.name: nodes
props.description: Segment nodes, clamped to 4–16.

props.name: anchor
props.description: Pin the first node, or both ends like a slung cable.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Drag any point to swing the rope; a Reset button re-drops it. The loop pauses offscreen and when the tab is hidden.
Under reduced motion it renders a static hanging catenary — no simulation.

items.title: Pendulum Wave
items.tagline: Periods that part, then realign.
items.description: A rank of pendulums whose periods step apart — released together they drift through traveling waves and snap back into alignment on a fixed cycle.

props.name: count
props.description: Pendulums, clamped to 4–20.

props.name: amplitude / cycleSeconds / baseOscillations
props.description: Swing angle, realign-cycle length, and the longest pendulum's swing count.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Motion is analytic — each bob follows a closed-form cosine, so the realign cycle is exact. Restart re-aligns them.
Under reduced motion it renders one static fanned frame — no loop.

items.title: Rubber Sheet
items.tagline: Pull the membrane; it rings back.
items.description: A taut mesh you pull toward the pointer with a smooth falloff; release and the vertices fire home, ringing through equilibrium twice before they settle.

props.name: columns / rows
props.description: Mesh density; columns default 9, rows default 7.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the surface.

usageNotes: The release rides the recoil spring, so the sheet overshoots and settles in two visible bounces.
Under reduced motion the mesh deforms 1:1 while dragging but snaps flat on release — no ripple.

items.title: Iron Filings
items.tagline: A field that aligns to your cursor.
items.description: A canvas lattice of dash filings that align to the cursor like iron around a magnetic pole — near the pointer they snap radial and brighten, far off they relax and dim.

props.name: spacing
props.description: Pixels between filings in the grid (clamped 16–48).

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px when used standalone.

props.name: children
props.description: Overlay content rendered above the field.

usageNotes: The canvas loop pauses offscreen and when the tab is hidden; colors re-resolve on a theme flip.
Under reduced motion it renders one static lattice frame — no loop, no cursor response.

items.title: Swarm Field
items.tagline: A flock that scatters from your cursor.
items.description: A canvas flock of boids that murmur with emergent flocking and scatter from the cursor, then regroup — separation, alignment, cohesion, and flee, on a spatial hash.

props.name: count
props.description: Boid count, clamped to 10–100.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px when used standalone.

props.name: children
props.description: Overlay content rendered above the field.

usageNotes: Neighbor queries run on a spatial hash, so the flock stays near O(n); the loop pauses offscreen and when hidden.
Under reduced motion it renders one settled frame — no loop, no scatter.

items.title: Magnetic Cursor
items.tagline: Targets that reach for the cursor.
items.description: A pointer layer for fine cursors — a drift-lagged spotlight trails the cursor and any MagneticTarget leans toward it, then springs back; inert on touch and reduced motion.

props.name: MagneticCursor.size
props.description: Spotlight follower diameter in px.

props.name: MagneticTarget.strength
props.description: Fraction of the pointer offset a target follows.

props.name: MagneticTarget.radius
props.description: Activation radius in px around the target.

usageNotes: Wrap real controls in MagneticTarget — the transform layer never touches focus or clicks.
Active only on (pointer:fine) with motion allowed; otherwise children render untouched.

items.title: Aurora Ribbon
items.tagline: Light ribbons that lean toward the cursor.
items.description: Slow sinusoidal ribbons of light that undulate across the field like an aurora and bend toward the pointer — a calm, luminous canvas backdrop.

props.name: bands
props.description: Number of ribbons, clamped to 1–6.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px when used standalone.

props.name: children
props.description: Overlay content rendered above the field.

usageNotes: Ribbons bloom where they overlap (additive compositing); the loop pauses offscreen and when the tab is hidden.
Under reduced motion it renders one static frame — no undulation, no pointer response.

items.title: Point Globe
items.tagline: A dotted planet you spin.
items.description: A globe of points on a Fibonacci sphere that drifts on its own and spins under your drag, carrying angular momentum — near points brighten, the far side dims.

props.name: points
props.description: Dots on the sphere, clamped to 120–700.

props.name: autoRotate
props.description: Idle drift when not being dragged.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Drag to spin; release carries momentum that decays back to the idle drift. The loop pauses offscreen and when hidden.
Under reduced motion it renders a static globe — no drift, no momentum.

items.title: Voronoi Shatter
items.tagline: Tap and the tessellation shatters, then reseals.
items.description: A Voronoi tessellation that fractures outward from your tap — shards fly, rotate, and fade, then ring back into place and reseal on the recoil spring.

props.name: cells
props.description: Voronoi seed sites, clamped to 8–60.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the surface.

usageNotes: Cells are a real Voronoi built from half-plane clipping, computed once; the shard transforms repaint imperatively from one progress spring.
Under reduced motion a tap leaves the tessellation whole — no shatter.

items.title: Comet Cursor
items.tagline: A comet that chases the pointer.
items.description: A contained field where the pointer drags a luminous comet — a bright head with a tapering tail that thickens with speed and collapses when you rest.

props.name: trail
props.description: Trail sample count, clamped to 8–64.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

props.name: children
props.description: Overlay content rendered above the field.

usageNotes: The tail widens with pointer speed and collapses into the head at rest; the loop pauses offscreen and when hidden.
Under reduced motion it renders one static frame — no trail, no pointer response.

items.title: Ripple Surface
items.tagline: Tap and wavefronts interfere.
items.description: Tap the surface and a wavefront propagates out; tap again and the rings overlap into visible interference — a calm canvas pond that answers every touch.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

props.name: children
props.description: Overlay content rendered above the field.

usageNotes: Concurrent ripples are pooled and capped; crests reinforce where wavefronts cross. The loop pauses offscreen and when hidden.
Under reduced motion it renders one calm static frame — a tap does not propagate.

items.title: Flow Diagram
items.tagline: Quantity, flowing between nodes.
items.description: A Sankey flow — nodes in columns, links sized to their value with a marching-dash current, and a hover that traces a node's whole upstream and downstream path.

props.name: nodes
props.type: { id: string; label: string; column: number }[]
props.description: Graph nodes with their column placement.

props.name: links
props.type: { source: string; target: string; value: number }[]
props.description: Flows; value drives link thickness.

props.name: height
props.description: Stage height in px.

usageNotes: Hover or focus a node to trace its connected path; an sr-only summary lists every flow.
Under reduced motion the dashes stop marching — the highlight is color only.

items.title: Timeline Spine
items.tagline: A playhead that rides your scroll.
items.description: A scroll-linked timeline — a playhead rides the spine as you scroll, the spine fills behind it, and each event pops in as the head reaches it.

props.name: events
props.type: { title: string; detail?: ReactNode; marker?: ReactNode }[]
props.description: Ordered events rendered along the spine.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the timeline region.

usageNotes: Events are a semantic ordered list, readable regardless of motion; the spine and playhead are decorative.
Under reduced motion everything renders in its final state — no scroll-driven animation.

items.title: Pull to Refresh
items.tagline: Pull past the detent; rows cascade in.
items.description: Over-pull the list past a calibrated detent and release — it holds to refresh, then settles back as the fresh rows cascade in.

props.name: onRefresh
props.description: Called when a past-detent pull is released.

props.name: children
props.description: The scrollable content.

props.name: threshold
props.description: Pixels past which release triggers a refresh.

usageNotes: Only engages when the list is scrolled to the top; a focusable Refresh button keeps it operable without a pointer.
Under reduced motion the pull eases home without overshoot and the new rows fade in once — no cascade.

items.title: Orbit Menu
items.tagline: A dial of options that snaps to a detent.
items.description: Items ring a hub and rotate on a weighted dial — flick the ring and it flings, then snaps the nearest item into the active detent at the top.

props.name: items
props.type: { id: string; label: string; icon?: ReactNode }[]
props.description: Options placed evenly around the ring.

props.name: value / defaultValue / onValueChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled active item.

props.name: size
props.description: Ring diameter in px.

usageNotes: Drag to spin, click an item, or arrow-key to rotate; a live region announces the active item.
Under reduced motion selection snaps to the detent instantly — no fling momentum.

items.title: Spark Burst
items.tagline: Restraint as celebration.
items.description: A calibrated celebration, not confetti — call fire() and a tight radial burst of hairline rays and a fast ring shoots out and fades, monochrome with a signal glint.

props.name: ref.fire(opts?)
props.description: Imperative handle — call it to emit one burst.

props.name: rays / spread
props.description: Ray count (default 12) and travel distance in px (default 40).

props.name: color
props.description: Ray color.

usageNotes: Get a ref of type SparkBurstHandle and call fire(); rapid fires stack and clean themselves up.
Under reduced motion fire() gives a single centered pulse — no radiating rays.

items.title: Heart Tap
items.tagline: Pop, sparks, and a rolling count.
items.description: A like that celebrates — the heart squashes then pops, a tight ring of sparks bursts once, and the count rolls up; un-liking deflates and rolls back down.

props.name: liked / defaultLiked / onChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled liked state; onChange gets { liked, count }.

props.name: count / defaultCount
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled count, clamped at zero.

props.name: size
props.description: Heart glyph size in px.

usageNotes: A real toggle button — Space/Enter like, aria-pressed and the count are announced.
Under reduced motion the fill switches and the count swaps instantly — no pop, sparks, or roll.

items.title: Reaction Fly
items.tagline: Reactions that bloom, then fly.
items.description: Press to bloom a reaction picker; choosing one sends a copy flying up — rising, drifting, and fading on its own jittered path — while its tally ticks up.

props.name: reactions
props.type: { id: string; label: string; node?: ReactNode }[]
props.description: The pickable reactions; defaults to a curated set.

props.name: onReact
props.description: Fires with the reaction id on each selection.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Names the trigger.

usageNotes: Full menu semantics — the trigger has aria-haspopup, items are menuitems, Escape closes, and each reaction is announced.
Under reduced motion the picker opens without stagger and selecting bumps the tally with no fly-up.

items.title: Command Deck
items.tagline: A palette that arms before it fires.
items.description: A command palette that arms before it fires — a deliberate fill sweeps the selected row before execution, so destructive commands never feel accidental.

props.name: commands
props.description: { id, label, hint?, icon?, section?, keywords?, destructive?, run } per command.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled visibility.

props.name: hotkey
props.description: Global ⌘K / Ctrl+K toggle listener.

props.name: inline / portal
props.description: Inline renders just the panel (docs/demos); portal overlays into body with focus trap and scroll lock.

props.name: recentKey
props.description: localStorage key for the five most recent command ids.

usageNotes: Full combobox semantics with focus trap and restore; Escape mid-arm cancels the sweep.
Under reduced motion the arming sweep becomes an instant fill with a deliberate 120ms pause.

items.title: Access Panel
items.tagline: Sign-in that unlocks like a vault.
items.description: Sign-in that unlocks like a vault — steps ride a gantry rail, OTP digits drop into their cells, and the right code throws a breaker bolt open.

props.name: expectedCode
props.description: The six-digit code that throws the bolt.

props.name: onVerify
props.description: Fires with the entered code on every attempt.

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Fires once when the correct code lands.

props.name: email
props.description: Prefills the email field.

usageNotes: One hidden input with autocomplete="one-time-code" drives the six visual cells — the accessibility-correct OTP pattern.
Under reduced motion the rail slides become fades and the rejection nudge is skipped; the alert still announces.

items.title: Signal Center
items.tagline: An inbox that files itself.
items.description: An inbox that files itself — signals arrive on the conveyor, swipe away with real velocity, and clear-all sweeps the floor in a cascade.

props.name: signals / defaultSignals / onSignalsChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled feed; Signal = { id, source, title, detail?, time, read? }.

props.name: onArchive
props.description: Fires per archived signal, including clear-all.

props.name: title
props.description: Header title next to the live unread readout.

usageNotes: Archiving is keyboard-reachable via a per-row button; swiping is the fast path, not the only path.
Under reduced motion arrivals and exits become fades and clear-all loses its stagger.

items.title: Media Console
items.tagline: A media island that unfolds into a console.
items.description: A media island that unfolds into a console — the pill morphs open into transport, a caliper timeline, and a scope-scrubbed volume.

props.name: tracks
props.description: { id, title, artist, duration } — playback is simulated; the JSDoc shows wiring a real audio element.

props.name: defaultExpanded
props.description: Start as the pill or the full console.

usageNotes: Complete keyboard transport; Escape collapses the console back to the pill.
Under reduced motion the morph becomes a crossfade and the waveform holds still.

items.title: Checkout Receipt
items.tagline: Payment that prints its proof.
items.description: Payment that prints its proof — hold to pay, then a receipt feeds out of the slot line by line, tears off, and takes a PAID stamp.

props.name: items
props.description: Line items ({ name, price }) summed into the total.

props.name: currency
props.description: Price prefix.

props.name: onPay
props.description: Fires when the hold completes.

usageNotes: The receipt is real text in a definition list; only the barcode is decorative.
Under reduced motion the receipt appears whole and the stamp fades in.

items.title: Intake Tray
items.tagline: Files land, physically.
items.description: Files land, physically — dropped files fall into the tray with a squash, shingle into a stack, fill their gauge rings, and slide to the processed rail.

props.name: onFiles
props.description: Receives each accepted batch.

props.name: accept / maxFiles
props.description: Accepted types hint and tray capacity.

props.name: simulate
props.description: Hash-driven demo progress; the JSDoc documents wiring real uploads.

props.name: ref
props.description: Imperative addFiles() for programmatic intake.

usageNotes: The drop zone is a real button with a labeled native file input — fully keyboard operable.
Under reduced motion chips stack neatly with fades; the gauge rings still fill.

items.title: Readout Grid
items.tagline: Dashboard stats as instrument cards.
items.description: Dashboard stats as instrument cards — a carry-rolling counter, a self-drawing sparkline, a split-flap delta, and a needle gauge, mounted with one cascade.

props.name: metrics
props.description: Optional full override of the four cards: counter, sparkline, flap, and gauge shapes.

usageNotes: Each card is an article whose label reads naturally to screen readers; chart visuals carry sr-only values.
Under reduced motion cards render in place, the sparkline arrives fully drawn, and the needle jumps.

items.title: Launch Checklist
items.tagline: Setup steps that stamp themselves done.
items.description: Onboarding checklist where ticks draw themselves, finished steps strike through and settle to the bottom, and completing the set lands a CALIBRATED stamp.

props.name: steps
props.description: Step definitions: id, title, optional description.

props.name: completed / defaultCompleted
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled set of completed step ids.

props.name: onCompletedChange
props.description: Fires on every toggle with the new completed set.

props.name: onComplete
props.description: Fires once when the final step completes.

usageNotes: Rows are native checkboxes under the hood — the whole block is keyboard and screen-reader operable.
Under reduced motion rows reorder instantly and the stamp fades in; the progress track still reports value via ARIA.

items.title: Iris Menu
items.tagline: Actions bloom from where you pressed.
items.description: Actions bloom from where you pressed — items launch from the trigger's center to seats along the freest quadrant's arc, and fold back in on close.

props.name: items
props.description: Up to six: { id, icon, label, onSelect, disabled?, destructive? }.

props.name: placement
props.description: Auto measures the viewport and blooms into the roomiest quadrant.

props.name: radius
props.description: Distance from trigger center to each seat.

usageNotes: Arrow keys rotate focus around the ring; Escape closes and restores the trigger.
Under reduced motion items fade in already seated — no travel.

items.title: Overflow Rail
items.tagline: More actions, sprung from the dots.
items.description: More actions, sprung from the dots — the pill rail morphs open inline while primaries yield with a recoil part and secondaries cascade in.

props.name: primary / secondary
props.description: Always-visible actions and the set revealed by the ⋯ trigger.

props.name: open / defaultOpen / onOpenChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled expansion.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible toolbar name.

usageNotes: One toolbar: arrows rove across every visible action; Escape collapses and refocuses the trigger.
Under reduced motion the width jumps and secondaries fade in place.

items.title: Beacon
items.tagline: One capsule, every live activity.
items.description: One capsule, every live activity — the shell morphs between timer, upload, call, and now-playing views with blur crossfades, corners pinned.

props.name: activity
props.description: Discriminated union: timer (endsAt), upload (progress), call (accept/decline), playing (title/artist); null collapses to a standby pill.

props.name: expanded / defaultExpanded / onExpandedChange
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled detail row.

props.name: onDismiss
props.description: Renders a dismiss action in the detail row.

usageNotes: Call buttons are reachable while collapsed; activity changes announce once, debounced.
Under reduced motion the shell resizes instantly and the loops hold still.

items.title: Field Report
items.tagline: Feedback that files itself.
items.description: Feedback that files itself — a notch rating with a gliding indicator, a growing note field, and a submit that folds the form into a slot under a LOGGED stamp.

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Fires on valid submit; rating is 1–5.

props.name: prompt / endLabels
props.description: The question and the rail's end labels.

props.name: resetAfterMs
props.description: Fades a fresh form back in after filing.

usageNotes: The rating is a real radiogroup — arrows move the indicator, and empty submits nudge with a role=alert line.
Under reduced motion the filing collapse becomes a fade and the stamp lands statically.

items.title: Not Found
items.tagline: Sweep complete. Sector empty.
items.description: Sweep complete, sector empty — a radar arc scans a quiet grid while the 404 numeral deciphers itself, with home and command-deck exits.

props.name: homeHref
props.description: Return-to-base link target.

props.name: onCommandDeck
props.description: Renders the ghost command-deck action when provided.

props.name: code / message
props.description: The cipher numeral and the rising subline.

usageNotes: The heading carries real text for screen readers; the cipher layer and radar are decorative.
Under reduced motion the sweep freezes mid-arc and the numeral renders plainly.

items.title: Forecast Card
items.tagline: Every vote moves every bar.
items.description: Every vote moves every bar — one commit renormalizes the whole field while percentages carry-roll and the leader tick migrates to the new front-runner.

props.name: question / options
props.description: 2–4 outcomes as { id, label, votes }; options are always the source of counts.

props.name: votedId / defaultVotedId / onVote
props.description: Controlled or uncontrolled viewer vote.

props.name: allowRevote
props.description: Let the viewer move their vote between outcomes.

props.name: closesAt
props.description: Compact mono CLOSES footer line.

usageNotes: Rows are aria-pressed buttons; each vote announces the new percentage and leadership once.
Under reduced motion widths jump and the leader tick teleports; the readouts pulse instead of rolling.

items.title: Balance Card
items.tagline: A balance with a private side.
items.description: A balance with a private side — the numeral carry-rolls behind a privacy blur, a sparkline draws itself, and the card flips to its activity face.

props.name: balance / format / delta / series
props.description: The carry-rolling amount, its delta chip, and the sparkline data.

props.name: activity
props.description: Back-face rows: { id, label, amount, time }.

props.name: onAction
props.description: Fires from the action row.

props.name: defaultHidden
props.description: Start with the balance blurred.

usageNotes: The hidden face is inert and aria-hidden — the flip never traps focus or leaks taps.
Under reduced motion the flip is instant, the sparkline arrives drawn, and the blur toggles without a tween.

items.title: Exchange Panel
items.tagline: Two units, one clean swap.
items.description: Two units, one clean swap — the edited side is live, the computed side carry-rolls after a debounce, and swapping keeps focus while contents trade places.

props.name: units
props.description: Linear factors to a shared base unit; groups render a grouped select.

props.name: feeRate
props.description: Fraction applied to the converted side, shown as a fee row.

props.name: onChange / onDirectionChange
props.description: Conversion updates and swap events.

props.name: debounceMs
props.description: Delay before the computed side rolls.

usageNotes: One side holds authority; the other is always derived — swapping transfers authority with the gesture and refocuses the input.
Under reduced motion contents swap instantly and the readout uses its highlight fallback.

items.title: Utils
items.tagline: cn() — class composition.
items.description: Class-name composition helper shared by every component.

items.title: Calibration Set
items.tagline: flick · snap · glide · drift · recoil.
items.description: Kinetiq's five calibrated springs plus the tween scale, cascade budget, and exit rules — the shared physics vocabulary every component draws from.

items.title: useMotionSafe
items.tagline: Reduced motion, decided once.
items.description: Single source of truth for reduced-motion decisions: combines the OS preference with an optional app-level override context.

items.title: Agent Rules
items.tagline: The design-system operating rules for agents.
items.description: Kinetiq's operating rules for coding agents: the five-spring motion language, the tween scale, the 600ms cascade budget, the reduced-motion policy, token usage, and composition guidance. Installs as AGENTS.md at your repo root so your agent stays on the system's vocabulary.
